question: Bagaimana cara menghubungkan ServiceAccount ke Pod agar Pod dapat mengakses Kubernetes API?
selection_rationale: SO answer score 18. ServiceAccount not covered in any existing fixture (coverage matrix shows all four types needed). 3-hop path (ServiceAccount→RoleBinding→ClusterRole) is fully annotatable from graph. New resource coverage with clean relationship type fit.

ground_truth.answer:
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: my-sa
---
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: Role
metadata:
  name: pod-reader
rules:
  - apiGroups: [""]
    resources: ["pods"]
    verbs: ["get", "list"]
---
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: RoleBinding
metadata:
  name: read-pods
subjects:
  - kind: ServiceAccount
    name: my-sa
roleRef:
  kind: Role
  name: pod-reader
  apiGroup: rbac.authorization.k8s.io
context: Buat ServiceAccount, buat Role dengan izin yang diperlukan, lalu bind dengan RoleBinding. Referensikan ServiceAccount di Pod spec via field serviceAccountName.
io.k8s.api.core.v1.ServiceAccount: provides an identity for processes that run in a Pod
io.k8s.api.core.v1.PodSpec: serviceAccountName specifies which ServiceAccount to use
io.k8s.api.rbac.v1.RoleBinding: grants the permissions defined in a Role to subjects including ServiceAccounts
